_readme: Claude appends an entry here whenever deck data or app behavior changes (newest first). Shown verbose in the settings footer, but ONLY for the JST account. Keep summaries short; details are 1-line bullets.

entries.summary: Freshness footer + fetch tracking on all load paths
details: Settings footer shows data Last-Modified + fetch time (this panel)
Multi-artist merge + CSV paths now tracked too
Cache bumped to v38 to force fresh data

entries.summary: Detector sweep: 78 junk cards hidden, 25 glosses fixed (no rerun)
details: 'tán' now = "are (short for 'están')" — was 9 suntan senses from English 'tan'
Hidden: rob/'syrup', vegas/'meadow', carmen/'poem', so, too, game, cash, +70 more
2 new bench detectors (verbatim-EN, mid-line caps) now guard regressions
